# ⏰  Save 5+ Hours/Week: Let Us Handle Your WordPress Maintenance (10% OFF)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-05-27 16:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 794

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Imagine getting back 20+ hours every month - that's what happens
when you're not stuck doing WordPress maintenance yourself.

Think about it: With those extra 20 hours, you could focus on
growing your business, create more content, or simply enjoy more
free time with your loved ones.

That's nearly three full workdays back in your hands every month!

Right now, you're juggling backups, updates, security, and
performance checks - all the technical tasks that keep your
WordPress site running.

Let us handle all that. Our Monthly WordPress Maintenance service
takes care of everything, giving you back precious time to focus
on what really matters.

And right now, you can Get a Flat 10% OFF on WordPress
Maintenance 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.ORMAIW7HefbOUT0y0WR1QthvB9SguzuYc3bpgdJfwEQ )
during our Memorial Day sale! 🎉

(Don’t forget to use the following coupon code during checkout:
MMD10)

Here's what our maintenance service includes:

• Regular WordPress core, theme, and plugin updates
• Routine cloud backups
• 24/7 uptime monitoring
• Real-time security monitoring and fixes
• Monthly site maintenance report
• Expert WordPress support whenever you need it

Simply choose the plan that fits your needs:

Our Sleep Better Plan starts at just $49/month, perfect for those
who want essential maintenance without breaking the bank. You'll
get all the core updates, security monitoring, and regular
backups your site needs.

But here's the smart choice: Our Peace of Mind Plan at $99/month
is actually our best value. You're getting 24/7 comprehensive
maintenance PLUS a monthly hour of on-demand development work,
all for the same price as a one-time quick fix.

That's like getting your maintenance service free with your
development hour!

Ready to take WordPress maintenance off your plate forever?

👉 Sign up for Monthly WordPress Maintenance Today (10% OFF) 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.ORMAIW7HefbOUT0y0WR1QthvB9SguzuYc3bpgdJfwEQ )
👈

Talk soon,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner

P.S.: This Memorial Day discount won't last long! Lock in your
WordPress maintenance savings before June 2nd.
